heading: Effective date of transfer
label: 460lll–41 Effective date of transfer
text: Effective on October 1 of the first fiscal year for which Congress does not appropriate to the Tennessee Valley Authority at least $6,000,000 for the Recreation Area, or, if this Act is enacted during a fiscal year for which Congress has not made such an appropriation, effective as of , administrative jurisdiction over the Recreation Area is transferred from the Tennessee Valley Authority to the Secretary.October 21, 1998
notes: References in TextThis Act, referred to in text, is , , , which enacted the Department of the Interior and Related Agencies Appropriations Act, 1999. Title V of the Act, known as The Land Between the Lakes Protection Act of 1998, is classified generally to this subchapter. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Tables.section 101(e) of div. A of Pub. L. 105–277112 Stat. 2681–231Oct. 21, 1998
